bead.title: ddx work: refuse to claim/drain a dirty or WIP project root (operator-attention, no churn)
bead.description: Decomposed from ddx-2a24727c (wedged: too large). SCOPE: ddx work pre-claim must detect a dirty/WIP canonical project root (uncommitted non-.ddx tracked changes, e.g. helix on a WIP docs branch) and emit a SINGLE operator-attention signal + skip, instead of repeatedly claiming->failing readiness in a churn loop (observed with helix). NON-SCOPE: isolated worktrees / cleanup contract (separate child). Self-contained; do not look for a routing spec.
bead.acceptance: 1. New test (scoped to internal/agent, bounded, no broad go test ./...): a dirty canonical root yields one operator-attention/skip, not a repeated claim loop. 2. clean root proceeds normally. 3. cd /Users/erik/Projects/ddx/cli && go test ./internal/agent/ -run DirtyRoot -count=1 -timeout 120s green. 4. lefthook run pre-commit passes.

events.summary: reviewer skipped: empty diff (no commits produced)
